CustomField.description: System field that reflects the overall processing status of the batch based on its child Data Import records. Set to Open before processing, Completed when all records succeed, or Failed - Needs Review if any records encounter errors.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Current processing status of this batch. Open = not yet processed, Completed = all records processed successfully, Failed - Needs Review = one or more records had errors.
CustomField.label: Batch Status
